title: Java Dungeons
description: Uses minimal mods to make the game like Minecraft Dungeons!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1bacb197d1139fd1050a0c76387778fd4cee658.png)

**Experience Minecraft like Minecraft Dungeons!**
#
![Note](https://i.imgur.com/FDLCdfl.png)

This modpack is based on the [**Dungeons Perspective**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeons-perspective) Mod by [cleannrooster](https://www.curseforge.com/members/cleannrooster/projects).
#
![Features](https://i.imgur.com/Lw3uev3.png)
- [**Dungeons Perspective**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeons-perspective) and click to play (by cleannrooster)
- Performance improvements.
- 1st person animations for 3rd person view.
- Improved UI.
- World hosting.
- Dungeons like combat.
- World map and minimap.
- No Mojang telemetery.
- Overall improvements for the Dungeons Perspective playing.
- Unfortunately runs poorly on low end PCs.
#
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cpL5Ct49/images/8eca2e40d41ac4aed63e3a1a58a63f6610fe917f_350.webp)
